# [SQL] Thinking in SQL is 90% of data engineering

## Most business data to analyze are in the form of tables

## Let's understand how our (fictional) employer's company works

## The term SQL is used interchangebly to mean the software that manipulates data and the code that you write

## Visualizing tables and its processing before writing code is key to effective data processing

## There are 7 critical SQL concepts to understand

## Imagine sliding a window over the rows in a table with Window functions
